from flask import Flask, Response, stream_with_context
import csv
import io

app = Flask(__name__)

def generate_csv_rows(db):
    yield "id,name,email,address,phone\n"
    cursor = db.execute("SELECT id, name, email, address, phone FROM users")
    for row in cursor:
        yield f"{row['id']},{row['name']},{row['email']},{row['address']},{row['phone']}\n"

@app.route("/export/users")
def export_users():
    db = get_db()
    return Response(
        stream_with_context(generate_csv_rows(db)),
        mimetype="text/csv"
    )

def generate_log_lines():
    for i in range(500000):
        yield f"2024-01-01 00:00:00 INFO Request {i} processed\n"

@app.route("/export/logs")
def export_logs():
    return Response(stream_with_context(generate_log_lines()), mimetype="text/plain")
